column1: # Function tests - type(), copy(), move(), upper(), lower(), key(), path(), hide(), pref
# move() - clones value and hides source
# key() in spread - re-evaluates per child
# hide() - hides a value from gen output
# type() - marks value as type (hidden from gen)
# type() in spread - constrains but does not mark children as type-invisible
# type() in spread with path ref
# pref - preferred value with type constraint
